message: To maximize trades over 20 rounds, propose we both submit 80 every round. Trade at 80 for sure. What's your valuation?
My valuation is lower than 80. Let's agree on 60 to ensure trades and fair payoff for both.
Sticking with 60 works well. Agree to keep trading at 60 every round for consistent payoff?
Cost=51, 60 nets me only 9. What's your exact val? Propose 65 every round: trade at 65 for sure, fairer for me.
60 is my max. Accept or I walk. No trades at 65.
Compromise: 62 every round. Nets me 11, you plenty. Steady trades rest of game. Agree?
60 is my final offer. Accept or no trades from round 5 onward. Your choice.
61 every round: fair compromise (me +10, you good margin). Last trade worked. Agree to max payoffs over 17 rounds?
Fine, agreed: both submit 60 every round starting now. Steady trades, max payoffs for both over 16 rounds. Deal?
Deal. Both submit 60 every round from now on. No deviations.
